description: Topics may include: Lie groups, algebraic groups, Chevalley groups, simple groups and associated geometries, group cohomology, group rings, Hopf algebras, enveloping algebras, quantum groups, infinite-dimensional Lie algebras, Hecke algebras, automorphic forms, Galois representations, zeta and L-functions, abelian varieties.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program
